scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, String, String, Parser) delegates to DataUtil.load with provided parser

scenarios.description: clean(String, String, Safelist) with empty baseUri and preserveRelativeLinks=true uses DummyUri to preserve link
scenarios.expectedResult: relative href '/r' remains in output because DummyUri substituted
pseudocode: TEST TC24 clean preserves relative links when enabled

scenarios.description: parse(URL, timeout) throws HttpStatusException on non-OK HTTP status
pseudocode: TEST TC25 parse URL 404 status exception
HTTP server at random port that responds 404 to GET '/'

scenarios.description: parse(URL, timeout) throws UnsupportedMimeTypeException on unsupported Content-Type
scenarios.precondition: HTTP server returns status 200 with Content-Type 'image/png'
pseudocode: TEST TC26 parse URL unsupported mime exception
HTTP server at random port that responds 200 to GET '/' with header 'Content-Type: image/png'
